name: Global Error Handler - Portfolio Real Integration Mode

parameters.content: Attach this workflow as the error workflow for each Real Integration Mode workflow. It logs workflow/node failures to PostgreSQL and emails the automation owner. It does not retry blindly because retries depend on the failed node and idempotency rules.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO workflow_errors (n8n_execution_id, workflow_name, node_name, severity, error_message, payload_reference) VALUES ('{{$json.n8n_execution_id}}', '{{$json.workflow_name}}', '{{$json.node_name}}', '{{$json.severity}}', '{{$json.error_message}}', '{{$json.payload_reference}}');
